articles.title: Artemis II leaves Earth's orbit on track for far side of the Moon
articles.summary: The mission's last, big push on its lunar journey takes humans out of the Earth's orbit for the first time since 1972.

articles.title: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
articles.summary: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.

articles.title: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
articles.summary: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.

articles.title: Italy's famed Uffizi admits cyber-attack but denies security breach
articles.summary: Hackers were reported to have infiltrated IT systems - but the gallery says its works are safe.

articles.title: Rapper Gucci Mane kidnapped and robbed by fellow artist, prosecutors say
articles.summary: Officials say the hip-hop star was forced to sign papers releasing a rapper known as Pooh Shiesty from his record contract.

articles.title: Italy part company with manager after failing to qualify for World Cup
articles.summary: Manager Gennaro Gattuso and Italy agree to "mutually terminate" his contract after their failure to qualify for a third successive World Cup.

articles.title: Trump removes US Attorney General Pam Bondi
articles.summary: Bondi's time as top US law enforcement officer was overshadowed by her handling of the Epstein files.

articles.title: Cuba to release more than 2,000 prisoners as US pressure mounts
articles.summary: US President Trump has made clear his desire to change Cuba's leadership and has placed the country under an oil embargo.

articles.title: US deports eight people 'of African origin' to Uganda
articles.summary: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".

articles.title: Pete Hegseth asks US Army's top general to step down
articles.summary: Gen Randy George was nominated for the role in 2023 by former President Joe Biden.
